title: Claude Fable 5 基准测试出色，Mythos 5 安全版发布
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Mythos Fable 5 benchmarks are huge 👀
Additionally, Claude Mythos 5, a separate model version with enhanced safeguards, has been released to a small group of cyber defenders and infrastructure providers.
Claude
@claudeai
9h
Introducing Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.
Its capabilities exceed those of any model we’ve ever made generally available.
00:00
8:22 PM · Jun 9, 2026 8.5K Views
